name: Air Admittance Valve
description: One-way valve that allows air into drainage systems to prevent siphoning.

name: Ball Valve
description: Quarter-turn shut-off valve for controlling water flow.

name: Compression Coupling
description: Compression coupling for joining two lengths of copper or plastic pipe.

name: Drain Tailpiece
description: Tailpiece used to connect sink bowls to the trap system.

name: 90° Elbow (Pipe Elbow)
description: Standard 90-degree elbow fitting for changing pipe direction.

name: Faucet Mixer
description: Single-lever mixer tap for kitchen or bathroom sinks.

name: Gate Valve
description: Handwheel-operated valve commonly used for isolating flow.

name: Hose Bibb (Outdoor Faucet)
description: Exterior threaded faucet for garden hoses.

name: Ice Maker Supply Hose
description: Flexible braided hose for connecting ice-makers/refrigerators.

name: Jet Pump (Booster)
description: Small jet pump used for boosting household water pressure.

name: Kitchen Sink Strainer
description: Sink strainer to prevent debris entering the drain.

name: Lavatory Faucet
description: Bathroom sink faucet in single or double-handle variants.

name: Mixing (Thermostatic) Valve
description: Mixes hot and cold water to a safe, consistent temperature.

name: Pipe Nipple
description: Short length of threaded pipe used to join fittings.

name: Overflow Plate
description: Cover plate for tub or sink overflow openings.

name: P-Trap
description: Curved trap that prevents sewer gases entering the building.

name: Quick-Connect Fitting
description: Push-fit connector for fast tool-free pipe joining.

name: Rough-In Valve
description: In-wall valve used during rough-in stage before finishes are installed.

name: Shut-Off Valve (Angle)
description: Under-sink or supply shut-off valve for individual fixtures.

name: Toilet Flange
description: Floor flange used to mount and seal a toilet to the drain.

name: Union Fitting
description: Fitting that allows easy disconnection of pipes for maintenance.

name: Vent Stack Pipe
description: Pipe used to vent the drainage system to atmosphere.

name: Wax Ring (Toilet Seal)
description: Wax seal installed between toilet base and flange.

name: X-Connector (Cross Fitting)
description: Cross-shaped pipe fitting for special plumbing configurations.

name: Y-Strainer
description: Inline Y-shaped strainer used to filter debris from flow.

name: Zinc Anode (Water Heater)
description: Corrosion-protection anode rod for water heaters.
